name: Cache Key Stability — agent-lab port
description: Original agent-lab coding maintenance task ported into the GoblinBench coding-agent harness.

input.task:
# Cache Key Stability Ticket

Equivalent filter requests are missing cache hits because the cache key builder is not stable enough.

Please fix key generation so that semantically equivalent filters generate the same key while still preserving meaningful differences like page number and archive mode.

Try to keep the change local to the key builder unless you genuinely need to touch the request model.

Target files:

- `EvalLab.Core/Cases/CacheKeys/FilterCacheKeyBuilder.cs`
- `EvalLab.Core/Cases/CacheKeys/FilterRequest.cs`
